title: Peloton Is Moving in the Right Direction, But It Still Has to Solve This 1 Problem
Trump threatens ‘hell’ on Iran if Strait of Hormuz remains blocked
description: WASHINGTON >> President Donald Trump today ratcheted up pressure on Iran, threatening in an expletive-laden Easter Sunday social media post to target Iran’s power plants and bridges on Tuesday if the strategic Strait of Hormuz is not reopened.

title: Alabama Locks in Nate Oats With New Deal, Tide Keep One of College Basketball’s Hottest Coaches Off the Market
description: The move continues Alabama’s effort to secure one of the sport’s most successful coaches before the market gets even louder. title: Easter morning shooting outside Anderson bar leaves man dead, woman injured
description: ANDERSON — Anderson police are investigating an early-morning Easter Sunday shooting that left a man dead and a woman suffering from a gunshot wound.

title: Inter CEO Marotta protects Alessandro Bastoni: “He is subjected to constant lynching”
description: Serie A side Inter have seen Alessandro Bastoni have a difficult few months ever since 2026 began. Nerazzurri CEO Beppe Marotta has come out in defence of the defender.Inter took on Roma on Sunday but...

title: Miguel Amaya hits RBI single, Cubs pitchers combine for 1-hitter in close win over Guardians
description: Four Chicago Cubs pitchers combined for a one-hitter in a victory over the Cleveland Guardians in the opener of a traditional doubleheader.

title: Greenhouse project boosts Isabela farmers’ income amid oil crisis
description: ROXAS, ISABELA, Philippines — A greenhouse farm in this town is helping farmers generate alternative income by growing high-value crops, such as honeydew, lettuce, melon, eggplant, onions, and other vegetables year-round, even during rainy or dry seasons, officials said. “We have been distributing free seedlings of high-value crops and vegetables to farmers and assisting them [...]... title: Teen injured in shooting near South 75th Avenue and Baseline Road Saturday night
description: Police are investigating after a teenage boy was shot near South 75th Avenue and Baseline Road late Saturday night.
